message:
chore: gitignore stray bv --graph-format artifacts

When bv is invoked with a malformed flag (e.g. --graph-format without =),
it can create files like `--graph-format.svg` in the working directory.
Ignore these to keep the tree clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,3 +123,6 @@ a.out
 .vercel
 .env*.local
 tests/artifacts/
+
+# Stray bv/CLI artifacts (malformed flag creates files like --graph-format.svg)
+--graph-format*
